title: Player head DR0P
description: if you kill a player it Drops their Head
body:
If you kill a player it drops their head .
- you can take their head and you can place it or do something with it
- you can add the datapack in your server and nobody must to install it
- the players head is also with their minecraft skin
- example:if i kill clownpierce(in game)then he will drop his head with his skin

## Join my discord server
- **Why?**: Report bugs or give ideas
- Link: [Click here](https://discord.gg/qVu49UHk7)
